name: v1.0.0-beta.3
body:
## What's Changed
* Dev by @not-my-username in https://github.com/SpectrumPro/Spectrum/pull/30

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SpectrumPro/Spectrum/compare/v1.0.0-beta.2...v1.0.0-beta.3

name: V0.2.0
body:
## V0.2.0 

### New Features
* Settings Menu, with option for UI scaling

### Bug Fixes
* Crash when connecting value to DMX value node
* Crash when deleting node that has a connection from the console
* Tons of small things

### Known Problems
* Changing colours of widgets not working
* Settings UI not scaling with rest of program

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SpectrumPro/Spectrum/compare/V0.1.3...V0.2.0

name: V0.1.0
body:
Latest (somewhat) stable version

New Nodes:
- Merge: Over and Under operations for dmx data
- Dmx Table: List multiple dmx entries
